chunks.subject: A lone runner
chunks.action: A lone runner traverses a wide, grassy alpine slope from left to right. The camera follows, capturing the runner's steady pace against a backdrop of distant, rugged mountain peaks. The camera movement is unsteady, suggesting it was captured while also in motion.
chunks.audio_character: Sync sound of footsteps on grass and rock.
chunks.editorial_notes: A raw, verite shot that places the runner's effort within a massive landscape. Useful for a training or race sequence to convey the scale of the challenge.

key_moments.description: A wide shot establishes a runner moving across a vast alpine meadow.
The camera continues to track the runner, emphasizing the scale of the surrounding mountains.

items.caption_text: subject: A lone runner | action: A person runs across a vast, grassy mountain slope, moving from left to right. | setting: A rugged, high-altitude mountain landscape with sparse vegetation and distant, imposing peaks under a clear sky. | framing: wide | mood: Solitary, adventurous, expansive, challenging | editorial_hooks: The runner is a small figure in a grand landscape, emphasizing scale and solitude.
